prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to England and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: The document discusses the activities and decisions of the National Data Guardian and related updates that specifically pertain to health and data protection in England, particularly involving NHS England and the Department of Health and Social Care. Therefore, it applies to England.
